Rythmos® Charging Dock

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Overview

Rythmos® Charging Dock is a multi-device charging solution designed to efficiently manage Plus and Flex Wearables. It enables centralized charging, ensuring devices are always ready for continuous resident monitoring.

FUNCTIONS

Charges multiple wearables simultaneously
Provides visual charge status via LED indicators
Supports daily device rotation and readiness
Ensures continuous device availability for residents

Key Capabilities

Multi-Device
Charging

Charge
up to five wearables at once

Fast
Charging

Full
charge in approximately 2 hours

Visual
Status Feedback

LED
indicators show charging state

Centralized
Charging Station

ML-based
monitoring and alerts

Plug-and-Play
Setup

No
configuration required

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 45.7 × 20.5 × 138.8 mm
Capacity: Up to 5 wearables simultaneously
Compatibility: Plus & Flex Wearables
Power: 24V / 20W adapter
Charging Time: ~2 hours (0–100%)
Indicators: LED status on wearable

System Topology — Charging Dock Deployment

Ideal for tracking and monitoring critical assets or individuals throughout the facility. Deploy in accordance with the community's layout to ensure full coverage and reliable alert delivery via the Rythmos® mesh infrastructure.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Place on flat, stable surface
- Locate in staff or charging area

Power

- Connect using provided 24V adapter
- Ensure constant power supply

Usage

- Dock wearables securely for charging
- Verify LED indicators for charge status

Maintenance

- Wipe dock with dry cloth
- Keep charging contacts clean

Operation

- Ensure proper device alignment in dock
- Monitor charging performance

Care

- Avoid liquid exposure
- Do not overload beyond capacity

intrexis.com
